scripts.build: node scripts/sync-env.js && powershell -Command "if (-not (Test-Path dist)) { New-Item -Path dist -ItemType Directory }; npx -y minify index.html | Out-File -FilePath dist/index.html -Encoding utf8; Get-ChildItem -Path . -File -Filter *.html | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne 'index.html' } | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName -Destination dist/ -Force }; Copy-Item css, js, assets, email-app, booking, status, api, functions, nobg.png, mitanshu.png, _headers, _redirects -Destination dist -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
